## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff weekly sync for Alex AI content strategy and production with GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/q4Z6brcyuFXTqy6TdoQ-pAzstkDrJUXL?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX to deliver content calendar + keywords next week, aiming for first blog article in 2-3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/q4Z6brcyuFXTqy6TdoQ-pAzstkDrJUXL?tab=summary&timestamp=1817.0)
  - [Adjusting priorities: Staffing content to be higher priority due to strong product-market fit](https://fathom.video/share/q4Z6brcyuFXTqy6TdoQ-pAzstkDrJUXL?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
  - [Production target: Ramping up to 5 blog posts per week, delivered in batches](https://fathom.video/share/q4Z6brcyuFXTqy6TdoQ-pAzstkDrJUXL?tab=summary&timestamp=2226.0)
  - [Next sync moved to Tuesday; Donald to finish reviewing artifacts and leave comments](https://fathom.video/share/q4Z6brcyuFXTqy6TdoQ-pAzstkDrJUXL?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Team and Roles

  - [Aida: Senior managing editor, main point of contact for 8-week sprint](https://fathom.video/share/q4Z6brcyuFXTqy6TdoQ-pAzstkDrJUXL?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Natalie: Managing editor focused on content production](https://fathom.video/share/q4Z6brcyuFXTqy6TdoQ-pAzstkDrJUXL?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Andi: Head of customer ops, filling in for Aida during vacation](https://fathom.video/share/q4Z6brcyuFXTqy6TdoQ-pAzstkDrJUXL?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)

### Content Generation Process

  - [Uses Atlas platform built by in-house dev team](https://fathom.video/share/q4Z6brcyuFXTqy6TdoQ-pAzstkDrJUXL?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Key steps: Brief creation, research, outline, article draft, fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/q4Z6brcyuFXTqy6TdoQ-pAzstkDrJUXL?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [Multiple human review points throughout the process](https://fathom.video/share/q4Z6brcyuFXTqy6TdoQ-pAzstkDrJUXL?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
  - [SEMrush API integration for keyword analysis and content structure](https://fathom.video/share/q4Z6brcyuFXTqy6TdoQ-pAzstkDrJUXL?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)

### Content Strategy and Priorities

  - [Four main topic clusters identified, prioritized based on business goals](https://fathom.video/share/q4Z6brcyuFXTqy6TdoQ-pAzstkDrJUXL?tab=summary&timestamp=1438.0)
  - [Staffing to be higher priority due to strong product-market fit](https://fathom.video/share/q4Z6brcyuFXTqy6TdoQ-pAzstkDrJUXL?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
  - [Focus on middle and bottom-of-funnel keywords for lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/q4Z6brcyuFXTqy6TdoQ-pAzstkDrJUXL?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
  - [Airtable and Looker dashboard used for content calendar and performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/q4Z6brcyuFXTqy6TdoQ-pAzstkDrJUXL?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)

### AI Visibility Tracking

  - [Using Scrunch tool to measure brand visibility in various LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/q4Z6brcyuFXTqy6TdoQ-pAzstkDrJUXL?tab=summary&timestamp=1903.0)
  - [Tracks mentions vs competitors across 100-200 prompts](https://fathom.video/share/q4Z6brcyuFXTqy6TdoQ-pAzstkDrJUXL?tab=summary&timestamp=1938.0)
  - [Considering using common sales call questions as prompts](https://fathom.video/share/q4Z6brcyuFXTqy6TdoQ-pAzstkDrJUXL?tab=summary&timestamp=2003.0)

### Blog Visuals and Publishing

  - [GrowthX can generate AI illustrations for blog hero images](https://fathom.video/share/q4Z6brcyuFXTqy6TdoQ-pAzstkDrJUXL?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)
  - [Alex's new designer may handle visuals; brand refresh in progress](https://fathom.video/share/q4Z6brcyuFXTqy6TdoQ-pAzstkDrJUXL?tab=summary&timestamp=2145.0)
  - [Manual publishing on Webflow initially, with potential for automation later](https://fathom.video/share/q4Z6brcyuFXTqy6TdoQ-pAzstkDrJUXL?tab=summary&timestamp=2158.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Donald to finish reviewing artifacts and leave additional comments](https://fathom.video/share/q4Z6brcyuFXTqy6TdoQ-pAzstkDrJUXL?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)

  - [Present content calendar and keywords in next week's meeting](https://fathom.video/share/q4Z6brcyuFXTqy6TdoQ-pAzstkDrJUXL?tab=summary&timestamp=1817.0)
  - [Aim to deliver first blog article for review in 2-3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/q4Z6brcyuFXTqy6TdoQ-pAzstkDrJUXL?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)
  - [Set up access to Airtable and Looker dashboard for Donald](https://fathom.video/share/q4Z6brcyuFXTqy6TdoQ-pAzstkDrJUXL?tab=summary&timestamp=2058.0)
  - [Consider sharing sales call transcripts from Gong for prompt creation](https://fathom.video/share/q4Z6brcyuFXTqy6TdoQ-pAzstkDrJUXL?tab=summary&timestamp=2003.0)
